text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Spe, Spe! I heard you're having 
trouble with your homework.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I aaaam! Why does math have to be so hard…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, why didn't you say something sooner? 
The genius Teio will help you study!♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?! Well, then by all mea—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, Teio… 
Aren't you a year below me…?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Am I? Well, I'm super smart, 
so it doesn't matter!♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks, Teio! Then please, share your 
math knowledge with me!
